title: Cobblemon HUD
description: Add cobblemon elements to your HUD, like replacing your hunger bar with sitrus berries
body:
# Introduce
This resource pack transforms your minecraft HUD into a cobblemon theme, perfect for use with cobblemon modpacks.
# Features
**Hunger bar -> sitrus berry**  
**Health -> pokeball**
- Absorption -> ultra ball
- Wither -> slate ball
- Poison -> safari ball
- Frostbite -> dive ball
**Armor -> ability shield**  
**Mounts -> heavy ball**  
Compatible with [AppleSkin](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin)  
**Hardcore:Various ancient balls**  
# Last
This package does not require any mods and you can add it to your modpack.
My English is not good, the above content is generated by Google Translate. Please forgive me if there are any errors.
